title: Her Eyes And Mouth.
content:
There is no Paradise like that which lies
    Deep in the heavens of her azure eyes:
    There is no Eden here on Earth that glows
    Like that which smiles rich in her mouth's red rose.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Her Eyes And Mouth."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
